overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval waterfront city at dusk. The character traverses a wooden pier extending over calm water, passing NPCs and market stalls in a moody, overcast atmosphere with distant mountains visible through the haze.

events.description: moving from cobblestone plaza onto wooden pier structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the plaza past the unicorn statue toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress standing near the statue

entered.detail: large white stone statue of a rearing unicorn on a circular pedestal
large potted tree with dark purple foliage in a stone planter
medieval stone buildings with tiled roofs lining the waterfront
misty mountains visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a cobblestone plaza featuring a prominent white unicorn statue. Geralt walks past scattered NPCs and potted trees, transitioning onto a wooden pier that extends over calm water toward misty mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with market stalls and fishing spots

events.description: passing by NPCs sitting on wooden benches along the pier railing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the wooden pier past market stalls and fishermen

notable_agents.action: man in red hat and puffy sleeves walking past Geralt
person sitting on bench facing the water

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canvas awning and goods displayed
decorative lanterns suspended on wires above the pier
tall spired castle visible on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow wooden pier, Geralt passes market stalls and NPCs. The cobblestone plaza falls behind as the pier extends over the water, with hanging lanterns overhead and a distant castle coming into view across the misty water.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier with panoramic water view

events.description: reaching the end of the pier and turning around to face back toward the city
view opens to show wide expanse of water and snow-capped mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt reaches the end of the pier, turns around to face the city, and begins walking back

notable_agents.action: man sitting at the end of the pier fishing

entered.detail: wooden posts and crates at the pier end used for fishing
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the clouds

segments.scene_description: At the pier's end, Geralt turns around near a fishing spot. The view opens to reveal snow-capped mountains across the water before the character begins the return journey toward the city.

events.description: approaching the plaza area with the unicorn statue coming back into view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking back toward the city along the pier, passing guards and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: man with umbrella walking toward the pier end
guard in blue armor standing watch near the waterfront

entered.detail: stone bridge with arches spanning the water to the left
cobblestone plaza area at the pier entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking back toward the city, Geralt passes a stone arch bridge and approaches the plaza. The unicorn statue grows larger in view as the character returns from the pier, with medieval guards and townsfolk visible along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling cobblestone plaza toward a distant castle across a misty waterfront. It begins in an open square featuring a prominent white unicorn statue, moving past scattered NPCs and potted trees as Geralt transitions onto a wooden pier. As the camera advances, the cobblestone plaza falls behind and the environment narrows into a walkway extending over calm water. The scene then shifts to pass under hanging lanterns and beside market stalls, with the hazy horizon gradually revealing a castle looming across the water.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a remote waterfront edge and retreats back into the heart of a bustling medieval city. It begins at the end of a wooden pier where Geralt turns away from a fishing spot, momentarily revealing a vista of snow-capped mountains across the calm water. As he begins the return journey, the perspective shifts from the open horizon toward the urban architecture, passing a stone arch bridge. The scene then expands into a lively plaza, where the presence of medieval guards and townsfolk increases as the camera approaches. Finally, the view centers on a prominent unicorn statue that grows larger in the frame as the character fully reintegrates into the city's waterfront district.
